title: Template Access Agreement for buildings covered by the Developer Remediation Contract
body: "This template access agreement and accompanying guidance are intended to assist developers and Responsible Entities to agree terms on which a developer may enter a building to undertake a survey or assessment, as required under the Developer Remediation Contract. Using this template may help the parties to accelerate work to assess and remediate the building.   This template and accompanying guidance do not constitute legal advice, and any party that intends to use this template agreement may wish to take independent legal advice and should read the accompanying guidance. "
